greeting: 👋 Welcome to KICKINBANANA! I am BananaBot, your expert jersey companion. Ask me any question about pricing, sizing, custom orders, delivery, or quality, or click one of the quick suggestions below!
fallback: I want to make sure you get the absolute best replica jersey fit. Let me connect you directly with our team on WhatsApp for this custom request!

responses.response: Our premium replica jerseys start from ₹1,299 up to ₹1,499. Custom player name and number printing adds just ₹100 extra! Bulk team orders of 10+ jerseys qualify for flat 15% discount packages.

We support standard S, M, L, XL, and XXL sizes. Our football jerseys feature professional slim athletic fit (Siam High-Grade replica versions). If you prefer a relaxed fit, we highly recommend selecting one size larger than your casual shirt.

Absolutely! We do official-style heat transfer vinyl printing for any custom Name (up to 15 characters) and Number (0-99). You can specify these parameters in our Custom Jersey Form section or share them directly on WhatsApp!
We dispatch orders within 48 hours. Standard tracked shipping across India takes 5-7 business days and is completely free! Express air shipping (2-3 days delivery) is available on request.

We offer hassle-free size exchanges within 7 days of delivery for unused jerseys with original tags intact. Please note custom printed jerseys with personal names/numbers cannot be exchanged unless there is a print defect.
We have the India T20 World Cup edition, ODI blue jerseys, and major IPL team replica jerseys. All feature sweat-wicking dry-fit mesh fabrics.
Our catalog features premium replica jerseys including Real Madrid Home, Inter Milan Home, Arsenal Away, Argentina 3-Star, and Brazil Triumphant Home. All badges are detailed embroidery.
Yes, we support full team orders! Orders of 10+ jerseys receive 15% off, and 25+ jerseys receive 20% off plus free customized printing. Connect with us on WhatsApp to get a formal quote!
We accept all secure UPI options (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), NetBanking, and credit/debit cards. Cash on Delivery (COD) is available with a nominal advance fee to verify shipping address.
Our replica jerseys are Siam High-Grade quality, made from 100% premium double-knit dry-fit polyester mesh. They are breathable, lightweight, and identical in weave and feel to official fan jerseys.
Once dispatched, a tracking link from Delhivery/BlueDart is sent to your phone. You can also send us a WhatsApp message with your order details for instant updates.
Follow us on Instagram @kickinbanana_11 to browse customer unboxing videos, size reviews, and live catalog drops!
